parameters.responseBody: ={"ok":true,"message":"Your request was received. We will review the vehicle, requested service, and schedule before preparing an estimate."}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $('Validate + Build Google Payloads').item.json;
const drive = $('Create Drive Lead Folder').item.json;
const calendar = $('Create Calendar Verification Event').item.json;
const aiSummary = 'Pending local Drive analyzer. The VPS collected the request and stored Google Workspace artifacts; local AI should analyze the Drive folder from the private machine.';
const squareRaw = $('Create Square Payment Link').item.json?.stdout ? (() => { try { return JSON.parse($('Create Square Payment Link').item.json.stdout); } catch { return { raw: $('Create Square Payment Link').item.json.stdout }; } })() : {};
const squarePaymentLink = squareRaw?.payment_link?.url || '';
const squareOrderId = squareRaw?.payment_link?.order_id || '';
const squareAmount = squareRaw?.amount ? (squareRaw.amount / 100).toFixed(2) + ' ' + (squareRaw.currency || 'USD') : '';
const squarePaymentStatus = squareRaw?.enabled === false ? 'Not requested' : (squarePaymentLink ? 'Payment link created' : (squareRaw?.status || 'Payment link unavailable'));
const driveUrl = drive?.webViewLink || (drive?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${drive.id}` : 'Drive folder unavailable');
const calendarUrl = calendar?.htmlLink || 'Calendar event unavailable';
const subfolders = {
  intake: $('Create Intake Subfolder').item.json?.webViewLink || ($('Create Intake Subfolder').item.json?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${$('Create Intake Subfolder').item.json.id}` : ''),
  photos: $('Create Photos Subfolder').item.json?.webViewLink || ($('Create Photos Subfolder').item.json?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${$('Create Photos Subfolder').item.json.id}` : ''),
  estimate: $('Create Estimate Subfolder').item.json?.webViewLink || ($('Create Estimate Subfolder').item.json?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${$('Create Estimate Subfolder').item.json.id}` : ''),
  invoices: $('Create Invoices Subfolder').item.json?.webViewLink || ($('Create Invoices Subfolder').item.json?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${$('Create Invoices Subfolder').item.json.id}` : ''),
  delivery: $('Create Final Delivery Subfolder').item.json?.webViewLink || ($('Create Final Delivery Subfolder').item.json?.id ? `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${$('Create Final Delivery Subfolder').item.json.id}` : ''),
};
const internalMessage = [
  lead.details,
  '',
  'Lead stage: New',
  `Customer folder: ${driveUrl}`,
  `Calendar event: ${calendarUrl}`,
  '',
  'Subfolders:',
  `- Intake: ${subfolders.intake}`,
  `- Photos: ${subfolders.photos}`,
  `- Estimate: ${subfolders.estimate}`,
  `- Invoices: ${subfolders.invoices}`,
  `- Final Delivery: ${subfolders.delivery}`,
  '',
  'Local analysis:',
  aiSummary,
  '',
  'Square payment:',
  squarePaymentLink ? `Payment link: ${squarePaymentLink}` : `Status: ${squarePaymentStatus}`,
].join('\n');
const slackMessage = [
  `*New GT service request:* ${lead.fullName || lead.email}`,
  `*Vehicle:* ${lead.vehicleLabel}`,
  `*Service:* ${lead.requested_service || 'Not provided'}`,
  `*Phone:* ${lead.phone || 'Not provided'}`,
  `*Email:* ${lead.email}`,
  `*Customer folder:* ${driveUrl}`,
  `*Calendar:* ${calendarUrl}`,
  `*Square:* ${squarePaymentLink || squarePaymentStatus}`,
  '',
  `*Local analysis:*\n${aiSummary}`,
].join('\n');
const priority = /urgent|asap|today|tomorrow|deadline|transport/i.test(`${lead.requested_service} ${lead.notes}`) ? 'High' : 'Normal';
const nextAction = 'Review request and contact customer';
const sheetLink = (url, label) => url ? `=HYPERLINK(${JSON.stringify(url)},${JSON.stringify(label)})` : '';
const sheetAppendBody = { values: [[
  lead.timestamp,
  lead.lead_id,
  'New Request',
  'New Lead',
  priority,
  'New Lead - Estimate Needed',
  lead.first_name,
  lead.last_name,
  lead.fullName,
  lead.email,
  lead.phone,
  lead.vehicle,
  lead.requested_service,
  lead.source_site,
  lead.consent_to_contact ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  lead.notes,
  sheetLink(driveUrl, 'Open Customer Folder'),
  sheetLink(calendarUrl, 'Open Calendar Event'),
  sheetLink(subfolders.intake, '01 Intake'),
  sheetLink(subfolders.photos, '02 Photos'),
  sheetLink(subfolders.estimate, '03 Estimate'),
  sheetLink(subfolders.invoices, '04 Invoices'),
  sheetLink(subfolders.delivery, '05 Final Delivery'),
  aiSummary,
  new Date().toISOString(),
  nextAction,
  squarePaymentStatus,
  sheetLink(squarePaymentLink, 'Open Square Payment'),
  squareOrderId,
  squareAmount,
  'Not Sent',
  'Lead Intake',
  '',
  'Pending',
  '',
  '',
  '',
]] };
return [{ json: {
  ...lead,
  aiSummary,
  driveUrl,
  calendarUrl,
  subfolders,
  squarePaymentStatus,
  squarePaymentLink,
  squareOrderId,
  squareAmount,
  sheetAppendBody,
  internalEmail: { to: lead.notifyTo, subject: lead.internalSubject, message: internalMessage },
  customerEmail: {
    ...lead.customerEmail,
    message: squarePaymentLink && /^true$/i.test($env.SQUARE_SEND_LINK_TO_CUSTOMER || '')
      ? `${lead.customerEmail.message}\n\nSecure Square payment link: ${squarePaymentLink}`
      : lead.customerEmail.message,
  },
  slackMessage,
  slackChannel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID || '#gt-collective-detailing-leads',
}}];
